title: frangula × blumeri
intro: Frangula × blumeri, also known as Cascara Sagrada, is a hybrid plant species in the buckthorn family (Rhamnaceae) that is native to North America. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include laxative and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Frangula × blumeri include treating constipation, digestive issues, and promoting bowel health, as well as reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions. Frangula × blumeri can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is often used as a natural remedy in herbal medicine.
